family_evidence.note: No direct publications found for this device, but 7 device(s) in the same product_code family (MXD) have 109 publication(s). These devices share the same FDA classification and intended use.

recalls.reason: It may create the potential for amplified noise and/or overall signal reduction of the ICM, which may interfere with intended recordings of heart rhythms. This noise pattern is different from occasional noise due to device position/migration, patient activity, or external electromagnetic interference.
recalls.product_description: ICM LNQ22 LINQ II, Model LNQ22; Insertable Cardiac Monitor
